burden.dalyPerCapita: high per-case disability; ICU needs in severe cases
burden.mortalityRate: Low to moderate (3-7% in severe cases)

vulnerablePopulations: patients with recent GI or respiratory infection
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Progressive symmetric weakness and areflexia; CSF albuminocytologic dissociation; EMG/NCS

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; improved with early IVIG or plasmapheresis

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Neurology evaluation in tertiary hospitals; EMG access varies
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: IVIG or plasmapheresis; respiratory monitoring and ICU support when needed
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited ICU beds and IVIG availability in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established neurology centers in major hospitals
